stories.title: Add rel='noopener noreferrer' to all external links
acceptanceCriteria: All <a> tags with target='_blank' have rel='noopener noreferrer'

stories.title: Add aria-label to icon-only links
acceptanceCriteria: Footer social/contact icons have descriptive aria-label attributes

stories.title: Move inline styles to CSS utility classes
acceptanceCriteria: Replace all inline margin/padding styles with class names

stories.title: Add missing meta tags for SEO
acceptanceCriteria: Add <meta name='theme-color' content='#050508'> to all pages

stories.title: Standardize page titles format
acceptanceCriteria: All titles follow: 'Page Topic | Plepic' format

stories.title: Optimize image loading attributes
acceptanceCriteria: Above-fold images: remove loading attribute (default eager)

stories.title: Add focus-visible styles for keyboard navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Add .btn:focus-visible with cyan outline in styles.css
Focus ring visible on Tab navigation

stories.title: Add breadcrumb navigation schema
acceptanceCriteria: Add breadcrumb JSON-LD to training/index.html: Home > Training
Add breadcrumb JSON-LD to agent/index.html: Home > Agent

stories.title: Verify all images have descriptive alt text
acceptanceCriteria: All company logos have descriptive alt (e.g., 'Helmes logo')
Team photos have person names in alt
No empty alt except decorative images

stories.title: Add semantic markup to code snippets
Optimize Google Fonts loading
acceptanceCriteria: Audit CSS for used font weights
Remove unused weights from Google Fonts URL

stories.title: Remove unused CSS classes
acceptanceCriteria: Identify classes in styles.css not used in any HTML
